options: Yes — CFO rules live, cache fix confirmed

items.title: Create QB Cost of Labor sub-accounts
items.note: In QuickBooks: COGS > Cost of Labor. Manually add two sub-accounts: 'Cost of Labor - Dunkley' and 'Cost of Labor - Frost'. Required before any shoot costs can be categorized by person — which blocks the Lili invoice.

items.title: Lili invoice
items.note: Invoice for Lili Geller. Blocked until QB sub-accounts (t1) exist. Still need from you: line items for the shoot and what Aidn was paid.

items.title: Restart Cosmo on Local
items.note: SSH into Local (192.168.1.73) and restart the Cosmo process. CFO rules and cache fixes are staged but not live until restarted. Run: pkill -f cosmo.py && nohup python3 ~/Cosmo/cosmo.py >> ~/Cosmo/cosmo.log 2>&1 &

items.title: Wire Cosmo → CFO dispatch hook
items.note: Adds a hook so Cosmo can trigger the CFO agent on command. Small wiring job — blocked until Cosmo is restarted and confirmed working.

items.title: QBO OAuth: decide Path A or B
items.note: Path A: Submit Intuit review form for production API access — takes days but gives live QB data. Path B: CSV export workflow — works today, manual steps. This decision is holding up CFO automation. Pick one.

items.title: Aerial Tour split — confirm with Ty
items.note: Revenue split for Aerial Tour jobs with Ty. Currently assumed 50/50 but not confirmed. Affects CFO waterfall calculations.

items.title: Signature video — name, price, split
items.note: Premium product that needs a name, price point, and partner split defined. CMO can't market it and CFO can't track it until these are locked.

items.title: Welcome deck PDF export
items.note: Export v15 Welcome deck PPTX from PowerPoint as PDF, then run: python3 ~/Desktop/Claude\ Outputs/Design/set_pdf_spread.py <file.pdf>

items.title: WRM Website
